mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate, directly lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate rises above 4.5 percent, it signals deteriorating labor market conditions that compress consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and housing starts indicate a synchronized contraction in real economic activity, which compresses equity risk premiums and forces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls below 100 and HOUST falls below 1400
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns with statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing, or the interaction term coefficient becomes insignificant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid monetary tightening, a 50-basis-point monthly increase in the federal funds rate compresses equity valuations by raising the cost of capital, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns in tightening episodes do not significantly differ from baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the signal's predictive power vanishes when controlling for VIX levels.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real GDP indicates expanding aggregate demand that supports corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When total nonfarm payrolls exceed 200,000 for three consecutive months, it confirms robust labor market expansion that fuels consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal, or predictive accuracy drops below 55% in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where industrial production rises while housing starts fall indicates a structural shift toward commercial investment over residential construction, which historically precedes equity market corrections and yields negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 1% while HOUST falls > 5% in same month
failure_condition: The interaction term fails to improve model fit (F-test p > 0.10), or forward returns in divergence months are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: In a disinflationary regime where CPI growth decelerates for two consecutive months, the market anticipates a pivot in monetary policy, which compresses equity risk premiums and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL month-over-month change declines for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward returns in decelerating inflation periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 50% over a 5-year window.
